---
title: "10. Características Basales"
format: html
---

# 9. Características basales:

```{r}
BBDDmet$cens.x = ifelse(BBDDmet$cens.y == 1, "Diabetic", "Non-Diabetic")
BBDDmet$death19 = ifelse(BBDDmet$death19 == 1, TRUE, FALSE)
BBDDmet$sexo = ifelse(BBDDmet$sexo == "mujer", "Woman", "Man")
BBDDmet$hta0.x = ifelse(BBDDmet$hta0.y == 1, "Yes", "No")
BBDDmet$hipercol0.x = ifelse(BBDDmet$hipercol0.y == 1, "Yes", "No")
BBDDmet$fum = factor(BBDDmet$fum,
                     levels = c("0", "1", "2"),
                     labels = c("Never", "Current", "Former"))
BBDDmet$grup_int = factor(BBDDmet$grup_int,
                     levels = c("1", "2", "3"),
                     labels = c("MedDiet + VOO", "MedDiet + NUTS", "Control"))

vars = c("death19","edad0", "sexo", "imc1", "ant_fam", "fum", "hta0.x", "hipercol0.x","grup_int", "p14", "energiat", "alcoholg", "getota_1.x", "hdl1","ldl1","col1", "TG","glucose0_0")

table1 = CreateTableOne(vars = vars, strata = "cens.x", data = BBDDmet, test = TRUE)
table1_df = print(table1, quote = FALSE, noSpaces = TRUE, printToggle = FALSE)
table1_df = data.frame(Variable = rownames(table1_df), table1_df, row.names = NULL)

wb = createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "TableOne")

writeData(wb, "TableOne", table1_df)
saveWorkbook(wb, file = "tabla_comparativa.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)

rm(vars, wb, table1, table1_df)
```
